elements.title: Clara Sansoni
elements.contents: ... that the performance of Iberia by Clara Sansoni (pictured) was called a "dual revelation" of Isaac Albéniz's "originality" and her own "courage and affection"?

elements.title: Assalamualaikum Beijing
elements.contents: ... that the producers of Assalamualaikum Beijing had to hire an Indonesian embassy chef when shooting on location?

elements.title: William Rogers Chapman
elements.contents: ... that William Rogers Chapman has been described as "the father of good music in Maine"?

elements.title: as a silhouette
elements.contents: ... that the video game character Luigi first appeared as a silhouette?

elements.title: Sofia Spångberg
elements.contents: ... that Sofia Spångberg traced her lifelong pacifism to age seven, when a weeping soldier picked up her infant brother and said "I have one like this at home"?

elements.title: Sassacus-class gunboats
elements.contents: ... that the 28 Sassacus-class gunboats constituted the largest class of warships built in the United States prior to World War I?

elements.title: Ruben Sim
elements.contents: ... that YouTuber Ruben Sim has documented explicit content on the platform Roblox?

elements.title: 135 East 57th Street
elements.contents: ... that after three tenants left New York City's 135 East 57th Street, its owners went from having a nearly fully-occupied building to being unable to make payments?

elements.title: Profesor Indigo
elements.contents: ... that Peter Nagy based his song "Profesor Indigo" on his former math teacher?
